flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Point Park University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.8k → $21.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Point Park University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.6k → $39.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Point Park University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Point Park University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (45.4% → 52.8%).
